<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>For Jess</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --green-deep: #1e3a1a;
    --green-mid: #3a6b2a;
    --green-light: #6aaa52;
    --green-pale: #d4e8c8;
    --green-mist: #eef5e8;
    --earth: #7a5c3a;
    --cream: #f8f4ed;
    --text-dark: #1e2e1a;
    --text-mid: #4a5e3a;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body {
    background: #e8f0dc;
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center;
    padding: 48px 20px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }
  .card {
    width: 720px;
    background: var(--cream);
    border-radius: 32px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 32px 100px rgba(20,50,15,0.25), 0 0 0 1px rgba(100,160,70,0.2);
  }
  .header {
    background: linear-gradient(150deg, var(--green-deep) 0%, #2d5520 55%, #3d7030 100%);
    padding: 52px 56px 44px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .header-orb1 {
    position:absolute; top:-90px; right:-70px; width:320px; height:320px; border-radius:50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(100,180,60,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .header-orb2 {
    position:absolute; bottom:-120px; left:-80px; width:380px; height:380px; border-radius:50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(180,230,120,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .leaf-deco { font-size:24px; letter-spacing:8px; margin-bottom:16px; opacity:0.7; }
  .header-for {
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-weight:300; font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green-pale); opacity:0.7; margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .header-name {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:72px; font-weight:700;
    color:#e8f5d8; line-height:1.0; letter-spacing:-2px; position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .header-tagline {
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:21px;
    color:rgba(200,235,160,0.72); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5; max-width:480px; position:relative; z-index:1;
  }
  .message-section { padding: 40px 56px 0; }
  .message { font-size:16px; color:var(--text-mid); line-height:1.85; }
  .message em { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:18px; color:var(--green-mid); }
  .delivery-section { padding: 28px 56px; }
  .delivery-badge {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:18px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg,#e4f0d4,#d0e8bb);
    border:1.5px solid #b0d490; border-radius:18px; padding:20px 26px;
  }
  .delivery-icon { font-size:36px; flex-shrink:0; }
  .delivery-label { font-size:10px; font-weight:500; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:var(--green-mid); margin-bottom:4px; }
  .delivery-date { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:700; color:var(--green-deep); }
  .delivery-window { font-size:13px; color:var(--earth); margin-top:2px; }
  .section-label { padding:0 56px 18px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
  .section-label span { font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green-mid); }
  .section-line { flex:1; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green-light),transparent); opacity:0.4; }
  .meals-section { padding: 0 56px; }
  .meal-card {
    background:white; border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid rgba(100,160,70,0.15); margin-bottom:20px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(30,58,26,0.07);
  }
  .meal-photo { width:100%; height:260px; object-fit:cover; object-position:center; display:block; }
  .meal-info { padding:20px 24px 22px; }
  .meal-type { font-size:9px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green-light); margin-bottom:5px; }
  .meal-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:26px; font-weight:700; color:var(--green-deep); margin-bottom:6px; line-height:1.2; }
  .meal-chef { font-size:12px; color:var(--earth); margin-bottom:10px; font-style:italic; }
  .meal-desc { font-size:14px; color:var(--text-mid); line-height:1.7; }
  .meal-tags { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:12px; }
  .tag { font-size:10px; font-weight:500; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px; background:var(--green-mist); color:var(--green-mid); border:1px solid var(--green-pale); }
  .sides-section { padding: 0 56px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .sides-note { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:16px; color:var(--earth); margin-bottom:18px; line-height:1.6; }
  .sides-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }
  .side-card {
    background:white; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid rgba(100,160,70,0.15); box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(30,58,26,0.06);
  }
  .side-photo { width:100%; height:130px; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top; display:block; }
  .side-info { padding:12px 14px 14px; }
  .side-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--green-deep); margin-bottom:4px; line-height:1.25; }
  .side-chef { font-size:10.5px; color:var(--earth); font-style:italic; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .side-desc { font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-mid); line-height:1.6; }
  .footer {
    margin:36px 0 0;
    background:linear-gradient(150deg,var(--green-deep),#2a5020);
    padding:32px 56px; text-align:center;
  }
  .footer-quote { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:19px; color:rgba(220,245,190,0.85); line-height:1.65; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .footer-from { font-size:11px; font-weight:300; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(180,220,140,0.5); }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="card">
  <div class="header">
    <div class="header-orb1"></div><div class="header-orb2"></div>
    <div class="leaf-deco">🌿 🌱 🌿</div>
    <div class="header-for">A gift of nourishment for</div>
    <div class="header-name">Jess</div>
    <div class="header-tagline">You're growing something beautiful — rest, eat well, and let the earth take care of you for a moment.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="message-section">
    <p class="message">Mama-to-be, I wanted to make sure you had one less thing on your plate this week (except for the delicious food on it). A full delivery of fresh, nourishing meals is headed your way on <em>Monday</em> — two gorgeous entrées and a trio of sides that'll carry you through a couple of meals. You deserve to rest. 🌾</p>
  </div>

  <div class="delivery-section">
    <div class="delivery-badge">
      <div class="delivery-icon">🚚</div>
      <div>
        <div class="delivery-label">Your Delivery</div>
        <div class="delivery-date">Monday, March 16th</div>
        <div class="delivery-window">Arriving between 3:00 – 6:00 PM</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-label"><span>2 Entrées</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>

  <div class="meals-section">
    <div class="meal-card">
      <img class="meal-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Herbed Rice Stuffed Peppers">
      <div class="meal-info">
        <div class="meal-type">Entrée · Vegetarian · Gluten Free</div>
        <div class="meal-name">Herbed Rice Stuffed Peppers with Tzatziki</div>
        <div class="meal-chef">by Chef Madeline M.</div>
        <div class="meal-desc">Bell peppers lovingly stuffed with herbed rice — fragrant with cilantro, parsley, dill, and sweet dried apricots — served with a cooling garlicky tzatziki. Bright, satisfying, and full of warmth.</div>
        <div class="meal-tags"><span class="tag">🌱 Vegetarian</span><span class="tag">🌾 Gluten Free</span><span class="tag">Low FODMAP</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="meal-card">
      <img class="meal-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vegetarian Squash Stew">
      <div class="meal-info">
        <div class="meal-type">Entrée · Vegetarian · Gluten Free</div>
        <div class="meal-name">Vegetarian Squash Stew</div>
        <div class="meal-chef">by Chef Jessica H.</div>
        <div class="meal-desc">A comforting Peruvian-inspired stew of slowly simmered butternut squash, potatoes, onions, garlic, and the gentle heat of ají amarillo — topped with creamy feta. Nourishing and deeply warming.</div>
        <div class="meal-tags"><span class="tag">🌱 Vegetarian</span><span class="tag">🌾 Gluten Free</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-label" style="margin-top:28px;"><span>3 Sides — mix &amp; match for more meals</span><div class="section-line"></div></div>

  <div class="sides-section">
    <p class="sides-note">These sides pair beautifully with both entrées — enough to stretch into another meal or two throughout the week.</p>
    <div class="sides-grid">
      <div class="side-card">
        <img class="side-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Syrniki">
        <div class="side-info">
          <div class="side-name">Syrniki</div>
          <div class="side-chef">Chef Galina P.</div>
          <div class="side-desc">Fluffy Russian cottage cheese pancakes, golden and crisp outside, tender within. Perfect with sour cream and jam.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-card">
        <img class="side-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Zeera Rice">
        <div class="side-info">
          <div class="side-name">Zeera Rice</div>
          <div class="side-chef">Chef Jasmeet Kaur S.</div>
          <div class="side-desc">Fluffy Indian basmati kissed with toasted cumin seeds. Vegan, organic, and pairs with absolutely everything.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="side-card">
        <img class="side-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Roasted Cauliflower">
        <div class="side-info">
          <div class="side-name">Roasted Cauliflower with Green Goddess</div>
          <div class="side-chef">Chef Madeline M.</div>
          <div class="side-desc">Golden-roasted cauliflower florets nestled in a vibrant herb-blended yogurt sauce. Fresh and stunning.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <div class="footer-quote">Growing a human is the most extraordinary thing — I hope this meal brings you a moment of peace, pleasure, and being taken care of. You've got this, mama. 🌿</div>
    <div class="footer-from">with so much love · for Jess &amp; Kyle</div>
  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
